topic: unit conversion, yards to feet, ratio tables
latex:
Your friend says that there are 36 feet in 12 yards. Is your friend correct? Explain your reasoning.

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|}
\hline
\textbf{Yards} & \textbf{Feet} \\
\hline
1 & 3 \\
\hline
4 & \\
\hline
 & 30 \\
\hline
12 & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

$1 \times 3 = 3$

$4 \times 3 = 12$

$10 \times 3 = 30$

$12 \times 3 = 36$
